name: Zomedica Corp.
summary: PARTI BUSINESS The Company Zomedica Corp. (Zomedica or the Company) was incorporated on January 7, 2013 under the Business Corporations Act (Alberta) as Wise Oakwood Ventures Inc. (WOW) and was classified as a capital pool company, as defined in Policy 2.4 of the TSX Venture Exchange. ZoMedica Pharmaceuticals Inc.
